Video.summary: Katerina Verbitskaya was raised as a noble lady with her godmother Anna Chervinskaya but for the whole world she was only the property of Peter Chervinsky. She falls in love with the nobleman Alexey Kosach who knows nothing about her origin. On the way to freedom and love, the serf maid will have to overcome a lot of trials.
Video.title: Amor en Cadenas|Amor al Limite - Episodio 8

Image.alt: Amor en Cadenas|Amor al Limite - Episodio 8
Amor en Cadenas|Amor al Limite - Episodio 8
Amor en Cadenas|Amor al Limite - Episodio 8

Video.summary: Miller y un estudiante se esconden con Katerina; Aleksey fue asesinado.
Video.title: Amor en Cadenas|Amor al Limite - Episodio 5

Video.summary: Katerina huye de Grigoriy; Nikolay la esconde en Kiev.
